summary: Plan-only inventory classification for five hydrated open PRs. No GitHub mutations are permitted by this job; merge is blocked for every PR because complete merge preflight is absent and/or checks/review findings remain unresolved. One narrow repair path is executable for #73440; the other PRs are kept as related remediation candidates pending author proof or maintainer follow-up.

actions.reason: Useful narrow documentation PR, but unresolved bot feedback and failed proof gate block merge preflight.

This is the clearest narrow repair candidate in the shard: it targets an open source issue, has maintainer-editable branch permissions, and has concrete review findings that can be fixed without broad redesign.
Complete repair plan is narrow enough for Clownfish to prepare a branch update or replacement fix artifact.
Keep as related maintainer-owned draft work; draft state, active maintainer follow-up, and scope inconsistency block automated repair or merge recommendation.

needs_human: #74068 requires maintainer judgment before automation because it is a maintainer-authored draft with active author follow-up and mismatched hydrated scope evidence.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair PR #73440 so the ownerAllowFrom memoization fix for #50289 handles cached empty arrays correctly and exposes a real test reset helper before any merge consideration.
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- carry forward #73440's ownerAllowFrom memoization fix for #50289
- return cached empty-array results by checking memo map membership instead of cached value truthiness
- make the ownerAllowFrom memo test reset helper actually clear the cache between tests

## Credit
- Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/73440 by @eric-zachary077
- Source issue: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/50289 by @songchenghao

## Validation
- pnpm test src/auto-reply/command-auth.owner-allow-from-memo.test.ts
- pnpm test src/auto-reply/command-auth.test.ts
- pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/auto-reply/command-auth.ts src/auto-reply/command-auth.owner-allow-from-memo.test.ts
credit_notes: Credit @eric-zachary077 as the source PR author for #73440.
Credit #50289 as the source issue report from @songchenghao.
